caption: The video appears to be an introduction to an educational talk or presentation by Pilar García Freire, who is identified as the Head of the Unit of Digital Educational Resources at INTEF, part of the Ministry of Education. The first frame introduces her with a professional headshot and her title, emphasizing her role as an educator. The subsequent frame invites teachers interested in Open Educational Resources (OER) to participate in an EDUcharla, which likely refers to an educational seminar or webinar. It highlights key topics such as understanding what OERs are, how to create them, where to find them, and how to use them effectively in teaching. The overall tone suggests an informative and instructional session aimed at enhancing educators' knowledge and skills in utilizing digital resources for educational purposes.
